narrative:
North Royalton-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 930 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
